name: Berty the Giraffe
short_description: Step into the Shoes of Berty the Giraffe in this 2D Top-Down Dungeon Crawler
detailed_description:
Berty the Giraffe is an arcade-style turn-based 2D roguelike, Players take control of Berty, a giraffe on a quest to navigate procedurally generated levels filled with dangerous enemies and obstacles.

Key Features:

  • Procedurally Generated Levels: No two runs are the same, with dynamically generated environments ensuring endless replayability.

  • High Scores: Compete with your friends to get the highest score or the deepest level.

  • Accessibility: Large fonts and simple game mechanics ensure an enjoyable experience for all players.
